source_schema: schemas/1dotRefAND3.json (used verbatim -- upstream already ships a compiled ShExJ schema, no ShExC translation needed)
comment: 1dotRefAND3_failAll: on { <n1> <p1> <n2> } -- n2 has none of p2/p3/p4, so it fails all three ANDed shape references (ShapeAnd of 3 by-label refs as a TripleConstraint's valueExpr); exercises ShapeAnd with more than 2 alternatives, all by string-label reference rather than inline.
